changes: INFRA-2: Added neutral ExternalDatabaseConfig, JDBC URL generation, ExternalJdbcExecutor, connection test, DDL callback execution, timeout and failure wrapping.
INFRA-3: Added ExternalDatabaseMetadataReader and DatabaseMetadataSnapshot models for schema/table/column/key/index/catalog metadata with exact-name lookup behavior.
INFRA-6: Added SchemaModel, neutral DDL result types, parser, prechecker, PostgreSQL/MySQL generator, and metadata reverse generator.
blackboard.sourceScan: No forbidden runtime dependency strings found under infrastructure-component-persistence-jooq/src/main/java/org/carl/infrastructure/persistence/utils.

blackboard.title: INFRA-2/3/6 dev implementation complete
blackboard.decision: Move INFRA-2, INFRA-3, and INFRA-6 from Dev to Review after commit and platform comments.
blackboard.rationale: Implementation is contained in the required persistence-jooq utils package, module and full offline tests pass, and source scan confirms no forbidden Quarkus/CDI/JAX-RS/MicroProfile Config/Agroal/ER Tool dependency strings in production utils sources.

blackboard.context: Review the new org.carl.infrastructure.persistence.utils API surface, exact identifier handling, executor lifecycle/timeout cleanup, metadata catalog/schema fallback, and DDL parser/generator MVP coverage.

findings: Identifier quoting (quote() doubles backtick/double-quote) and string escaping (sqlString() doubles single-quote) are correct on injection-relevant paths.
ExternalJdbcExecutor: short-lived connections, positive-timeout guard, timeout/interrupt close the active connection and cancel the future; daemon cached pool; close() idempotent.
ExternalDatabaseMetadataReader: catalog/schema fallback, exact JDBC metadata names (no case/format guessing), wasNull-aware int reads.

Non-blocking notes only: a quoted DEFAULT literal containing 'primary key' can trip the inline-PK substring check; multi-token DEFAULT expressions capture a single token; serial+identity could co-emit on reverse-gen edge cases.

phases.name: Reusable Standalone Components
phases.content: Extract three app-neutral reusable infrastructure modules (removing ER Tool duplication): INFRA-1 web response envelope + exception mapping; INFRA-4 artifact storage; INFRA-5 shared crypto/hash/json/time utilities. Children run in parallel.
phases.target: All three modules build, pass tests, expose app-neutral APIs with no ER Tool imports, and can replace the corresponding ER Tool duplication.

archivedProjects.reason: aw-init Wave 2: user chose Replace existing graph

phases.name: Core Independent Libraries
phases.content: Implement `statemachine`, `rule-engine`, and `pdp` standalone modules. Each must expose an Ability interface, have unit tests, and be documented in `doc/AI_MODULE_GUIDE.md`.
phases.target: All three modules build, pass tests, and are demonstrable without Quarkus.

phases.name: AI and gRPC Clients
phases.content: Implement `qdrant-grpc` (Qdrant vector DB client) and `embedding-grpc` (Embedding service client) standalone modules. Includes proto definitions, generated stubs, and typed wrappers.
phases.target: Both clients connect to their respective services in integration tests; stubs are auto-generated from proto files.

phases.name: Quarkus Integration Modules
phases.content: Implement `broadcast` (Vert.x event bus) and `search` (Elasticsearch full-text search) as Quarkus extensions under `infrastructure-component-quarkus/`. Both follow the conditional bean registration pattern (`quarkus.plugins.<name>.enable`).
phases.target: Both extensions register correctly in a Quarkus app; demo wiring in `demo/` passes `./gradlew :demo:build`.

phases.name: Business Logic Modules
phases.content: Implement `approval` (approval workflow), `user` (user management), and `audit` (audit log) as Quarkus integration modules. These may depend on Phase 1 modules (statemachine, rule-engine).
phases.target: All three modules pass tests; `audit` captures structured events; `approval` integrates with `statemachine`.
